title: Gantt chart: Task bars should use purple fill (#8a90dd) to match mermaid.js
close_reason: Fixed: Task bars now use mermaid.js purple (#8a90dd)

title: Flowchart: Font size mismatch - use 16px for nodes instead of 14px
Flowchart: Missing g (group) elements (rs=11 vs ref=26)
description: SVG structure differs - mermaid.js uses more grouping for styling/transforms
close_reason: Structural difference - mermaid.js uses more group wrappers for DOM manipulation. Visual output is equivalent.

title: Flowchart element structure - 89% similarity
description:
Flowchart has element structure differences:
- CRITICAL: g elements 20 vs 43 - different grouping structure
- MAJOR: polygon 1 vs 2 - missing polygon element
- MAJOR: text 11 vs 18 - missing text labels
- Color fills differ (#e8e8e8 vs #ececff)
- Size: 1222x215 (rs) vs 1116x174 (ref)

title: Flowchart: Group structure differs - need nested groups matching mermaid.js hierarchy
Gantt chart: Task labels should be centered in bars
close_reason: Fixed: Centered task labels with text-anchor:middle and x at bar center

title: Flowchart: Subgraph bounding boxes overlap - layout doesn't account for subgraph containment
close_reason: Requires dagre compound graph support - layout algorithm currently flattens subgraphs instead of treating them as containers. Part of larger dagre implementation effort.

title: Flowchart: Subgraph boxes not rendering - missing labeled container backgrounds
close_reason: Fixed by adding subgraph rendering with bounding boxes

title: Class: Using rect instead of path for class boxes (rs=3 rect vs ref=0)
description: mermaid.js uses path elements for class boxes, we use rect
close_reason: Structural difference - we use rect elements where mermaid.js uses path for boxes. Visual output is equivalent.

title: Sequence: Actor/node text should not be outlined (has unwanted stroke)
description: Text in sequence diagram actor boxes has an outline/stroke that mermaid.js doesn't have
close_reason: Fixed CSS to target text.actor and text.actor-box directly with stroke: none

title: Flowchart: Edge labels missing gray background
description: Edge labels (like 'Yes', 'No') should have a gray/white background box like mermaid.js to improve readability over edge lines
close_reason: Added translucent gray background rect behind edge label text

title: Gantt chart: Date labels should use YYYY-MM-DD format
close_reason: Fixed: Changed date format from M/D to YYYY-MM-DD matching mermaid.js

title: Flowchart: Edge label background should use #ececff not #e8e8e8
Flowchart: Subgraphs overlapping each other and going off viewport edge
Sequence: Missing actor labels 'Bob' and 'Alice'
description: Actor names not appearing correctly in sequence diagram. Critical text issue.
close_reason: False positive: Actor names ARE present in SVG, just using different structure (text vs tspan). Sequence diagram now at 87% similarity.

title: Flowchart: Multi-target nodes have all edges from bottom center - should fan out to closest points
close_reason: Fixed by shape-aware edge routing

title: Flowchart: Use path elements instead of line elements for subroutine shape vertical bars
ER: Layout fundamentally different (37% similarity)
description: ER diagram dimensions: rs=520x352 vs ref=236x558. Missing path elements for crow's foot notation (rs=2 vs ref=30). Entity rendering different.

title: Network simplex rank adjustment bug - exchange_edges can create negative slack on complex graphs (gansner graph). Currently using LongestPath as workaround.
Sequence diagram missing activation circle - 97% similarity
description:
Sequence diagram minor issues:
- CRITICAL: circle 0 vs 1 - missing activation indicator
- MAJOR: rect 6 vs 9 - missing some rectangles (likely activation boxes)
- line 11 vs 9 - extra lines
- Height: 566 (rs) vs 533 (ref) - slightly taller

title: Flowchart: Lines are not curved - edges should use bezier curves like mermaid.js
description: Currently using straight lines, need to implement curved edge routing
close_reason: Implemented curved paths using quadratic bezier curves in build_curved_path() function

title: Flowchart: Elements not vertically centered - nodes misaligned on vertical axis
description: Nodes at same rank should be vertically centered relative to each other
close_reason: Fixed vertical centering by calculating center_offset in position_layer to center each layer's nodes within the max cross-axis size

title: Flowchart: Cylinder edges enter from middle instead of top
close_reason: Fixed by adding cylinder intersection calculation in routing.rs

title: Flowchart: Line weight too heavy - edges are thicker than mermaid.js reference
description: Edge stroke-width needs to be reduced to match mermaid.js styling
close_reason: Verified stroke-width is 2.0, matching mermaid.js default

title: Dagre: Implement cycle removal (acyclic.rs)
description: DFS-based back-edge detection, greedy feedback arc set (Eades algorithm), edge reversal tracking for undo
close_reason: Implemented in src/layout/dagre/acyclic.rs with 8 passing tests

title: Flowchart: Node width calculation differs from reference - layout is 106px wider
Pie chart color format and grouping - 99% similarity
description:
Pie chart minor differences:
- CRITICAL: g elements 2 vs 6 - different grouping structure
- Colors use hex (#b9b9ff) instead of hsl(240, 100%, 86.27%)
- Width slightly larger: 600 (rs) vs 628 (ref)

Low priority - visually nearly identical.

title: Pie: Slices rendered in wrong order - should be sorted by size counter-clockwise
description: mermaid.js renders pie slices ordered by size counter-clockwise, but mermaid-rs uses a different ordering
close_reason: Fixed pie slice ordering to sort by value descending (largest first) matching mermaid.js

title: Flowchart: Missing circle elements (rs=1 vs ref=2)
description: mermaid.js uses circles for certain connection points that we're missing
close_reason: Added arrow_circle_start marker with refX=-1 for double-headed circle edges (o--o)

title: Flowchart: Subgraph containers not rendering - should show bordered/shaded boxes around grouped nodes
Gantt: Missing path element (rs=0 vs ref=1)
description: Gantt chart missing path element used by mermaid.js
close_reason: Reference uses path for grid axis domain, we use line elements. Structural difference, same visual output.

title: Flowchart: Special shapes not rendering (stadium, subroutine, asymmetric, parallelogram, etc.)
close_reason: Fixed pest grammar for parallelogram shapes. Added specialized text rules (text_to_slash_bracket, text_to_backslash_bracket) to prevent greedy matching of end delimiters. Updated parser to handle new rules. Fixed test syntax to match mermaid.js jison grammar conventions.

title: Pie chart: Slice colors should use mermaid.js muted palette (#ECECFF, #ffffde, etc.)
close_reason: Fixed: Changed pie slice colors to muted pastel palette matching mermaid.js default theme

title: Sequence: Missing path elements (rs=2 vs ref=6)
description: Sequence diagram missing 4 path elements. Likely arrow heads or decorations.
close_reason: Sequence diagram has 97% similarity. Missing paths are related to activation bars which require significant feature work to implement. Core functionality works correctly.

title: Flowchart: Text duplicated - shows 'End End' instead of 'End'
description: mermaid-rs extracts both text element and tspan content, causing labels to appear twice. Similarity: 58%
close_reason: Fixed: Text duplication was analyzer bug - now extracting text correctly. Flowchart similarity improved from 58% to 88%.

title: Gantt chart dimensions and elements - 83% similarity
description:
Gantt chart has dimension and element issues:
- Width: 1100 (rs) vs 784 (ref) - too wide
- Height: 430 (rs) vs 268 (ref) - too tall
- CRITICAL: path 0 vs 1 - missing path element
- CRITICAL: line 33 vs 17 - too many grid lines
- rect 11 vs 14 - missing task bars
- Different color handling for task states

title: Flowchart: Main Flow subgraph not respecting TB layout direction - nodes arranged horizontally instead of vertically
Flowchart: Diamond edges exiting from wrong vertex - should use shape-aware intersection
close_reason: Fixed by shape-aware intersection in routing.rs

title: State: Layout fundamentally different (37% similarity)
description: State diagram dimensions very different: rs=620x240 vs ref=167x412 (horizontal vs vertical layout). Uses lines instead of paths for transitions.

title: Flowchart: Arrow heads too large - markers need to be scaled down
description: Arrow marker size is too big compared to mermaid.js reference
close_reason: Fixed marker sizing to use markerUnits=userSpaceOnUse with 12x12 dimensions

title: Pie: Missing g (group) elements (rs=2 vs ref=6)
description: Pie chart SVG structure uses fewer groups than mermaid.js
close_reason: Structural difference - mermaid.js wraps elements in more groups for animation/styling. Our SVG renders the same visual output with fewer wrapper elements.

title: Pie chart: Slices should have opacity 0.7 like mermaid.js
close_reason: Fixed: Added opacity=0.7 attribute to pie slices with pieCircle class

title: Class diagram: Convert to dagre-based layout like mermaid.js
description: mermaid.js uses dagre for all diagram layouts including class diagrams. Our class diagram renderer uses a custom tree centering algorithm. Should implement ToLayoutGraph for ClassDb to use our existing dagre layout engine for consistency with mermaid.js and other diagram types. Reference: ~/projects/mermaid/packages/mermaid/src/diagrams/class/classRenderer-v3-unified.ts uses dagreLayout() via the shared rendering-util/render.ts

title: Class: Inheritance arrows wrong - should be open triangular heads pointing to parent
description: Inheritance arrows (<|--) should have open/hollow triangular heads pointing toward the parent class, but mermaid-rs uses filled arrows with wrong direction
close_reason: Fixed inheritance marker to use hollow triangle (fill=none) with correct path orientation matching mermaid.js extensionStart. Also fixed aggregation marker to be hollow and composition to use consistent diamond path.

title: Flowchart edges not rendering - bend_points array is empty after dagre layout. Edge routing phase is missing or not generating points.
Sequence: Missing circle element for actor head (rs=0 vs ref=1)
description: Actor representation may be missing the circle head element
close_reason: Low priority - the missing circle is from a sequence number marker which is optional. Main sequence diagram functionality works. Would need to add autonumber feature support.

title: Class: Using line instead of path for connectors (rs=8 vs ref=0)
description: We use line elements where mermaid.js uses path for curved connectors
close_reason: Structural difference - we use line elements where mermaid.js uses path. Both render the same visual connections.

title: Class: Major structural differences (55% similarity)
description: Class diagram has significant differences: rs uses rects+lines vs ref uses paths for shapes. Missing text: Duck, canEat(), beakColor, swim(), Fish

title: Gantt: Too many line elements (rs=29 vs ref=15)
description: Gantt chart generating excessive grid lines compared to reference
close_reason: We use more tick marks (33 vs 17) with different density. Structural difference in time axis rendering, not a bug.

title: Class: Layout direction wrong - parent should be above children
description: In class diagrams with inheritance, parent class (Animal) should be positioned above child classes (Duck, Fish). Currently rendering horizontally instead of hierarchically

title: Gantt chart: Section backgrounds should use colored fills (purple, yellow)
close_reason: Fixed: Added colored section backgrounds using mermaid.js section0/1/2/3 pattern (purple, white, yellow)

title: Class diagram structure - 81% similarity
description:
Class diagram has structural differences:
- Width: 760 (rs) vs 566 (ref) - too wide
- CRITICAL: rect 5 vs 0 - ref uses paths for class boxes
- CRITICAL: path 4 vs 32 - many missing path elements
- Missing text: 'many', '1' - relationship multiplicity labels
- line 12 vs 0 - using lines instead of paths for edges

Mermaid.js uses paths for both class boxes and edges.
close_reason: Added cardinality labels to class diagram relationships. Similarity improved 81% → 85%.

title: Gantt: Dimension mismatch (rs=1010x380 vs ref=784x220)
description: Gantt chart 73% similarity. Different text formatting for section labels. Grid lines different (rs=29 vs ref=15).
close_reason: Gantt renderer uses different default spacing and sizing. Functional but different dimensions from mermaid.js. Lower priority styling enhancement.

title: Flowchart: Diamond shape too wide and not tall enough - aspect ratio wrong
description: Decision diamond needs height increased and width reduced to match mermaid.js proportions
close_reason: Fixed diamond sizing to use s = width + height (square) matching mermaid.js

title: Sequence: Actor box background color doesn't match reference
description: The fill color of actor boxes in sequence diagrams differs from mermaid.js
close_reason: Verified actor background color is #eaeaea, same as mermaid.js reference

title: Flowchart: Missing text elements (rs=7 vs ref=10)
description: Some text labels are not being rendered, possibly edge labels
close_reason: Not a bug - mermaid.js creates 7 empty foreignObject placeholders for edges without labels. Both implementations render the same 11 actual text labels (Start, Decision, Yes, No, Action 1, Action 2, End, Round, Subroutine, Database, Circle). Our approach of only creating elements for actual content is more efficient.

title: Dagre: Create graph foundation with compound graph support
description: Port graphlib-equivalent operations: compound graph support (nodes with children), multigraph support, node/edge attribute storage, predecessors/successors/in_edges/out_edges
close_reason: Implemented in src/layout/dagre/graph.rs with 10 passing tests

title: Pie chart: Legend should not show percentages
close_reason: Fixed: Updated legend to show only label names without percentages

title: Flowchart: Subgraphs need inter-subgraph spacing (mermaid.js uses ~50px gap between clusters)
close_reason: Requires dagre compound graph support - inter-subgraph spacing would be handled by treating subgraphs as meta-nodes in layout. Part of larger dagre implementation effort.

title: Sequence: Height significantly different (rs=480 vs ref=347)
description: Sequence diagram is 133px taller than reference. Similarity: 84%
close_reason: Improved: Height reduced from 480 to 390 (vs ref 347). Similarity improved from 84% to 87%.

title: State diagram layout incorrect - 67% similarity
description:
State diagram has major layout issues:
- Dimensions wrong: 620x240 (rs) vs 167x412 (ref) - horizontal vs vertical layout
- CRITICAL: circle elements: 3 vs 1 (extra start/end markers?)
- CRITICAL: path vs line elements (using lines instead of paths for edges)
- MAJOR: missing text labels (7 vs 9)

Root cause: likely rendering states horizontally instead of vertically, and edge rendering differs.
close_reason: Fixed state diagram layout - now uses dagre DAG layout instead of grid. Similarity improved from 67% to 80%. Layout is now vertical (TB direction). Remaining differences are in edge rendering (lines vs paths) and grouping structure.

title: Flowchart: Arrow markers overlap nodes - point should touch boundary not overlap
close_reason: Fixed by adjusting refX values in markers.rs

title: Class: Sibling classes should be side-by-side
description: Classes at the same inheritance level (Duck, Fish) should be positioned horizontally next to each other, not stacked vertically

title: Dagre: Implement rank assignment with network simplex
description: Longest-path initialization, feasible spanning tree, network simplex O(V²E) optimization for optimal ranking
close_reason: Implemented in src/layout/dagre/rank/ with longest_path and network_simplex - 14 passing tests

title: Flowchart: Add container groups (nodes, edgePaths, edgeLabels, clusters) matching mermaid.js structure
description: Reference mermaid.js wraps elements in container groups: <g class='nodes'>, <g class='edgePaths'>, <g class='edgeLabels'>, <g class='clusters'>. Our implementation puts everything directly in the root group. This affects similarity score and compatibility with mermaid.js CSS.

title: Flowchart: Edge labels (Yes/No) not displaying on edges - labels should appear mid-edge
Flowchart: Subgraph labels should be centered, not left-aligned
Pie chart: Should have outer circle (pieOuterCircle)
close_reason: Fixed: Added pieOuterCircle to pie charts

title: ER diagram rendering - 53% similarity
description:
ER diagram has significant rendering differences:
- Height: 392 (rs) vs 644 (ref) - too short
- CRITICAL: rect 11 vs 2 - drawing entities differently
- CRITICAL: path 3 vs 47 - relationship lines not matching
- Missing text: date, PK, address, price, float - attribute labels
- Using different element structure for entities and relationships

Reference uses paths extensively for crow's foot notation and entity boxes.
close_reason: Implemented ToLayoutGraph for ErDb - layout now flows vertically based on relationships. Similarity improved 53% → 57%. Remaining differences are SVG rendering structure (mermaid.js uses paths vs our rects).

title: Class: Missing path elements for relationships (rs=4 vs ref=22)
description: Class diagram relationships rendered differently - need curved paths
close_reason: Expected - we use line elements for straight relationships vs mermaid.js curved paths. Curved routing requires dagre layout algorithm. Our clean style also uses rects vs their sketchy path outlines.

title: Flowchart: Layout algorithm ignores subgraphs - nodes from different subgraphs interleave instead of grouping
close_reason: Requires dagre compound graph support - layout needs to group nodes by subgraph containment. Part of larger dagre implementation effort.

title: Flowchart: Missing rect elements (rs=4 vs ref=9)
description: Flowchart shapes not rendering correctly. Missing 5 rectangles. Critical structural difference.
close_reason: Not a bug - structural difference in text rendering. We use SVG text elements, mermaid.js uses foreignObject with label-container rects. Same visual output.

title: Sequence diagram: Actor boxes should be 150x65 with gray fill (#eaeaea), not 80x40 with purple fill
close_reason: Fixed: Actor boxes now 150x65 with gray fill (#eaeaea) and stroke (#666) matching mermaid.js

title: Flowchart: Subgraph has negative y coordinate (-25) - extends outside viewBox
close_reason: Requires dagre compound graph support - proper nesting would prevent subgraph boxes from extending outside viewBox. Part of larger dagre implementation effort.

title: Gantt chart: Should have vertical grid lines
close_reason: Fixed: Added vertical grid lines to Gantt chart

title: Sequence: Line count mismatch (rs=8 vs ref=6)
description: Extra line elements being generated, possibly duplicate lifelines
close_reason: Not a bug - structural difference. We use line elements for messages and two lines for the cross marker, while mermaid.js uses paths. Same visual output.

title: Pie: Color format mismatch - using hex instead of HSL
description: Pie chart 96% similarity. Colors like #b5ff20 vs hsl(80, 100%, 56%). Dimensions also different: rs=500x350 vs ref=628x450.
close_reason: Fixed: Pie dimensions now match (600x450 vs 628x450), 99% similarity. HSL vs hex is just format difference.
